rewards.description: The hurricane subsides, but it leaves behind a host of new threats to overcome. Speranza is alive with speculation swirling around a new ARC operation, evolving enemy threats, and unexplained aerial phenomena. Tian Wen is working furiously on new combat tech, while Shani and Celeste try to get an eye in the sky. What they uncover is anyone’s guess.
